caption: A man and a woman sit in wooden chairs on a stage against a dark background featuring purple neon light strips. The man, wearing a white button-down shirt and dark trousers, is seated on the left, while the woman, wearing a black t-shirt and dark trousers, sits on the right. Her shirt features the text "SO'S IN YOUR TECH" and a logo. In front of each person is a small white table holding a white electronic device. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands; he starts with both hands raised, lowers them to his lap, and then raises them again to emphasize a point. The woman remains mostly still, listening to the man with a neutral expression and her hands resting in her lap. The lighting and background remain constant as the man's gestures evolve.
